decision_basis: The evaluation found no need to change the v3.23 Batch prohibition, adapter family, authority, concurrency, Q0 triggers, quality promotion rules, or repository truth source.
Thin Native was the better quality result in this small corpus, but 4/9 success and two stopped trials are not a production promotion result.
Native plus mandatory agent-side gate prompting fell to 1/9 success. Its lower aggregate latency and token use cannot offset the quality-floor decline.

The 18 core trials span three separately Q0-admitted CLI generations after two observed host transitions. Pooled totals are directional and are not same-generation profile-promotion evidence; one intermediate Q0 generation was invalidated before any core trial.
Independent evaluator gates, evidence, cleanup, generation, Q0, recovery, and rollback controls remained necessary and must be retained.
The conditional Superpowers lane became inconclusive when its sealed VCS identity drifted. Trellis and Hermes remained not applicable to this corpus; no replacement or retirement claim follows.
next_action: Continue v3.23 P0A normative package closure at the next dependency-ready work item; Baseline Approval remains separate and inactive.
